title: crotalaria kolbergii
intro: Crotalaria kolbergii, also known as Bush Calabar or Kolbergia, is a plant species within the legume family (Fabaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria kolbergii include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as being used as an anthelmintic to expel intestinal parasites. Crotalaria kolbergii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
